name: Chicken and Broccoli Skillet
recipeIngredient: 4 chicken breast halves (boneless, skin-on, 1 pound total)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a cold large skillet with nonstick coating.
2. Preheat the skillet over medium heat.
3. Add broccoli, onion, lemon pepper, and thyme to the skillet.
4. Cook and stir for 3 to 4 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender.
5. Remove vegetable mixture from the skillet; keep warm.
6. Add oil and garlic to the hot skillet.
7. Rinse chicken; pat dry. Add chicken to the skillet.
8. Cook chicken over medium-high heat about 10 minutes, turning once,
until tender and no longer pink.
9. Add cherry tomatoes. Cover and cook for 1 to 2 minutes or until
heated through.
Makes 4 servings
Food Exchange per serving: 3 Lean Meat Exchanges + 1 Vegetable Exchange + 1 Fat Exchange
